name: Pau d'Arco
summary: Pau d'Arco has preclinical antimicrobial/cytotoxic research but no robust human clinical evidence and toxicity concerns at high doses.
description: Pau d'Arco contains lapachol and beta-lapachone, but product identity and dosing standardization are weak, limiting interpretability of mechanistic claims.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
